title: Nika Turns the Battle
description: On pages 12–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #10 as Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.
scene: Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WHA-?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: JWAAA AAM!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Child of the sawing Sun!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I am

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: UWAAAH!! Ahya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya Hya

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Close one!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: G’HA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Did you see him?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What a nostalgic face!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A dark belly is no place for someone like that! Let's go!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hang on!! The old-timer giants are here, too?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Gaba BA BA BA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's been too long, straw hat!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We had to come see you; the waiting around was getting unbearable!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: GEGYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA GYA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Cover and color spread next issue!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 3) A huki is a monstrous boar from Chinese folklore, famous for terrorizing the countryside.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 2) An isumade is a creepy bird yokai with a human face and a snake like body.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 5) A sand wyrm is a mythical serpent or leglass dragon that appears in numerous modern fantasy franchises. It could also be related to similar creatures in works like dune.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 1) A gyuki is a spider yokai, famous for it's giant cow like face. They attack people on the beach.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 4) A bakotsu is skeletal yokai that is said to be the spirit of a horse that burned to death.

summary: This part advances the Nika Returns on Egghead through 21 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
